summary:
Main
As the week comes to a close, take a moment to review the key insights from the past few days. We've gathered all the top insights for you to catch up at your convenience. Anemic Pacific Capesize Rates Drag the Overall Index Down - A sharp and unexpected collapse in Capesize Pacific rates, down nearly 70% in just two weeks to below $10,000, has now begun to weigh on the broader dry bulk market, with the average spot index hovering around $15,000.
